body:
## Summary
Adds a dark-mode toggle to the settings page.

- New **Appearance** section with a dark-mode switch in `settings.html`.
- `src/settings.js` applies the theme by toggling a `dark` class on `<html>` and persists the choice to `localStorage`. On first visit it respects the OS `prefers-color-scheme`.
- `src/settings.css` defines dark-theme values for the CSS custom properties plus a smooth transition.

Closes #1

## Testing
- `node --check src/settings.js` passes.
- Manually verified the toggle flips the theme, persists across reloads, and follows the OS preference on first load.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: Add dark-mode toggle to settings page
